quiz1.mission: I skipped some pages! Go back 3 pages.
quiz1.hint: Tap the right edge of the screen or swipe left to go back a page.

insight.title: Page Navigation in Manga Apps
insight.subtitle: Japanese manga reads right to left, so going back means tapping the right side.
insight.step1Title: Tap right edge or swipe left
insight.step1Desc: Tap the right edge or swipe left to go back one page.

quiz2.mission: I can not read the small text in the corner. Zoom in!
quiz2.hint: Pinch out with two fingers or double-tap to zoom in.

insight.title: Zoom In and Out
insight.subtitle: You can zoom in on small text or fine details using pinch or double-tap.
insight.step1Desc: Spread two fingers on the screen to zoom in on the manga.

quiz3.mission: Let us stop reading for now. Show the menu.
quiz3.hint: Tap the center of the screen to show the menu.

insight.title: Showing the Menu
insight.subtitle: Most manga apps show the header and footer menu when you tap the center of the screen.
insight.step1Desc: Tap the center of the screen to show the header and footer menu.

quiz4.mission: That was great! Tap the support button ten times to send power to the creator!
quiz4.hint: Quickly tap the large heart button on the last page ten times.

insight.title: Support and Like Feature
insight.subtitle: Many manga apps have a rapid-tap support feature to send encouragement to creators.
insight.step1Desc: Quickly tap the heart button multiple times to send your support to the creator.
